## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî no behaviour change
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî deps, config, tooling
- [ ] `docs`
- [ ] `test`

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes without errors
- [ ] No new ESLint errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code
- [ ] Components render correctly in dev server (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] API integration tested against local backend
- [ ] No hardcoded URLs or secrets
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
- [ ] Responsive layout verified (mobile + desktop breakpoints)
